nasb.text: For behold, they will go because of destruction; Egypt will gather them up, Memphis will bury them. Weeds will take over their treasures of silver; Thorns will be in their tents.

esv.text: For behold, they are going away from destruction; but Egypt shall gather them; Memphis shall bury them. Nettles shall possess their precious things of silver; thorns shall be in their tents.

cnv.text: 看哪！即使他們從毀滅中逃去， 埃及要收殮他們，摩弗要埋葬他們。 他們珍貴的銀器必為蒺藜所佔有， 他們的帳棚必長滿荊棘。

ccb.text: 即使你们逃脱毁灭之灾， 埃及人也要把你们聚集起来， 在摩弗埋葬你们。 你们的珍贵银器要散落在荆棘中， 你们的帐篷中要长满蒺藜。
